title: Joint Policy Auxiliary Stack With OOF Calibration
summary: Strategy papers treat pit timing jointly with compound choice and opponent interaction, not as an isolated binary label.
rationale: Strategy papers treat pit timing jointly with compound choice and opponent interaction, not as an isolated binary label. A useful extension is to predict auxiliary strategic labels and then calibrate/blend them strictly OOF, which may add structured signal beyond another raw feature block.
implementation_hint: Derive auxiliary train labels such as PitWithin2Laps, IsFinalStop, and NextCompoundFamily from future rows in train only; fit separate models for each, generate OOF/test probabilities, and feed them into a final CatBoost/LightGBM meta-model. Calibrate the final stack with fold-local sigmoid or isotonic only after OOF generation.
expected_effect: Regularizes the rare positive class, injects longer-horizon strategy context, and may improve public LB stability through better calibrated ensemble ordering.
risk: High leakage risk if auxiliary targets, ordered stats, or calibrators are fit on full data; all meta-features must be produced out-of-fold only.
